get.description: Per-device patch summary. Filterable by org or group.

Only includes patches for minions that still exist (no orphaned rows).

post.description: Initial patch application to a pipeline stage (creates first PatchPromotion for that stage).

Reads packages from the source stage's latest successful PatchPromotion.

get.description: Per-minion results for a single promotion including advisory snapshot.

post.description: Re-dispatch patch jobs only to minions that failed in a partial promotion.
Exclude a failing minion from a partial promotion. If it was the last failing minion, status → done.
